changelog:
v1.6.5 — Real DOCX Export, CloudEngine OpenAI Format, Pagination

- Real .docx export (proper OOXML ZIP format, not RTF)
- CloudEngine converted to OpenAI-compatible format (unified wire format)
- Removed 404 models (DeepSeek V4 Flash, Nemotron 3 Ultra, GLM-5/5.1)
- Conversation history pagination (20 per page with LOAD MORE)
- 331 tests passing, 0 analyze errors
